summary: v1.3 regression smoke test - all green. Backend: 68/68 unit tests pass + 3/3 remote smoke tests (match lifecycle w/ team generation, groups create+admin GET, MVP vote flow w/ 1-vote-per-phone enforcement). Frontend: home + all header nav (My Matches, Groups, Player History, Create Match) render correctly; /create-match, /player-history, /groups, /privacy all load with no console errors. ESLint flat-config addition did not break the CRA runtime.
critical_code_review_comments: FastAPI on_event startup/shutdown are deprecated (server.py:37, 112). Not blocking but should migrate to lifespan handlers before Fast API removes support.

Review-request text describes some endpoints inaccurately (e.g. /api/groups/{id} public GET, /api/mvp/vote) - the actual routes use admin-token URL paths (/api/groups/{id}/admin/{token}, /api/matches/{id}/mvp/vote). API is correct; docs in the request are outdated.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed matches/groups created against live URL (small volume, no cleanup needed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 68 pytest unit tests + 3 new remote smoke tests all green. Payload shapes: MatchCreate requires {date_time, location, total_cost, max_players}; PlayerJoin.position must be full names (Goalkeeper/Defender/Midfielder/Forward). Admin endpoints use /admin/{token}/... URL segments, not X-Admin-Token header. Public GET /api/matches/{id} redacts phone; admin GET returns phones.
